intentional_test_features: Over-triage/over-investigation trap: severe subjective distress ('I feel like I am going to have a heart attack') in a case with no red flags — tests whether the AI Doctor can reassure appropriately without either dismissing the patient or over-escalating to emergency care
True negative case: this case has no red flags present — tests whether the AI Doctor correctly does NOT escalate to T4/T5 when the constellation is reassuring
Identifiable reversible triggers (high caffeine intake, acute stress, sleep deprivation) should be explicitly elicited and addressed
AI Doctor must still recommend a baseline ECG for documentation purposes even while providing reassurance — omitting all investigation would also be a scoring gap
Anxiety/somatic symptom amplification: patient's catastrophising framing should be validated empathetically, not dismissed

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-03)
